campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transportation funding investments for March 2026, adopt a new policy about how city property can be used, and discuss efforts to fill open city jobs and keep employees.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and recruitment/retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing on plans to clean up hazardous conditions on certain properties identified by the County and voted to move forward with the cleanup work. The council also adopted a new technology policy for the city and approved a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Hazardous property abatement ordered by county
Public hearing on cleanup objections
New city technology disruption policy
Process for requesting reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve previous meeting minutes, review the town's finances from March, and authorize several agreements and contracts. The council approved donations, service agreements, a paving construction contract, and grant applications while also adopting a project list for the upcoming fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved donation of an Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Authorized paving construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Submitted grant applications for statewide programs
Adopted project list for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agenda items and review work plans for various committees. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and discussed what to add to the June 2 draft agenda, including updates to neighborhood services and city government oversight plans.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 City Council meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda planning and item additions
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve previous meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the upcoming fiscal year. The council also reviewed schedules and priorities for various boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for 2026-27
Public comment period
Board and commission meeting schedules

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, where they recognized Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month as special observances for the community.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Recognition of Affordable Housing Month
Review of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element, which guides planning through 2040, and recognized the Public Works Department for their work on infrastructure and services. The council also celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan (2015-2040)
Recognition of Public Works Department during Public Works Week
Celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss planning and development issues related to the station area. The meeting was open to the public both in person and via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall Council Chambers (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Public participation available in-person and via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 to address several land use and administrative matters. Key actions included considering new city ordinances, approving a property development permit change, confirming an assessment, and appointing a permanent City Manager.
keyTopics: New city ordinances being proposed and reviewed
Property development permit amendment and tentative map approval
Assessment confirmation and ordering (likely for a special district or project)
Appointment of permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city comply with air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update and progress
Proposed principles for home electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance requirements
Staff presentation on electrification program details
